arts.ttl: Alan Shearer makes bold prediction for Arsenal vs Newcastle Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: Arsenal were beaten at home by Newcastle United in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final, leaving Mikel Arteta's side with a lot of work to do on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Arsenal 'agree' Nico Williams deal as Chelsea eye Gittens
arts.sum: The transfer window has closed for most top European leagues but planning will already be all underway for the summer window. Teams are working tirelessly behind the scenes on identifying targets...

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel reveals why he made Tottenham transfer over Arsenal and Man Utd
arts.sum: Mathys Tel had a number of clubs pursuing him but eventually opted for Tottenham over Arsenal or Manchester United with Bayern Munich's Harry Kane helping to influence him

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur beat rivals Arsenal, Man City to record-breaking wonderkid transfer with the future looking bright for North London club
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur announce the capture of Mason Melia from League of Ireland outfit St Patrick's Athletic in a deal worth an initial £1.5m.

arts.ttl: Joelinton replacement named and Howe changed backed as Arsenal verdict given
arts.sum: It's Carabao Cup semi-final day and despite Eddie Howe's team all but picking itself of late, the Newcastle United boss has decisions to make for the second leg with Arsenal. Starting XI: Dubravka, Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall, Longstaff, Bruno, Tonali, Gordon, Murphy, Isak.

arts.ttl: ‘Personal annoynace’ – Player disappointed Newcastle United haven’t moved for him yet
arts.sum: Boca Juniors’ Kevin Zenón isn’t pleased with the lack of concrete efforts from Newcastle United to sign him, according to Infobae. The Magpies are one of the clubs to be regularly named as an interested party. In October, Pasión Fútbol stated Newcastle were in the picture to sign him in the winter market. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta has to take a chance and start Arsenal's 'big talent' against Newcastle tonight - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal face the major challenge this evening of having to overturn a 2-0 deficit away at Newcastle and Mikel Arteta must take one big chance...

arts.ttl: The Arsenal words Newcastle United should pin on dressing room wall as Dan Burn stays cool
arts.sum: Going into the game, Arsenal star Gabriel Martinelli has claimed his team is good enough to score up to five goals in the second leg. Burn said ahead of the game: "We learned a lot from that cup run.

arts.ttl: Arsenal full squad revealed for Newcastle United as two 'secret' signings play in the Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's big week for Arsenal has started well. Goalkeeper Neto is cup-tied, so will have to sit this one out, while academy shot-stopper Jack Porter comes in as back-up to David Raya between the posts.

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal didn't sign a striker in January and how Alexander Isak could make them regret it
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta was frustrated in his chase for a striker with Isak, who fired Newcastle into a Carabao Cup semi-final first leg lead, among those deemed impossible to sign
